title: Long Xuyen, An Giang — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Long Xuyen, An Giang: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Long Xuyen is a city in An Giang with a population of 280,000. A Mekong Delta city known for its floating markets and riverside life, offering one of the lowest costs of living in all of Vietnam.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
